scripts.dev:motocom: CONVEX_URL=https://motocom.aoo.cz/convex NUXT_PORT=31900 NUXT_HOST=127.0.0.1 NUXT_DEV_PORT=31900 DEV_PUBLIC_HOST=motocom.aoo.cz DEV_HMR_CLIENT_PORT=443 nuxt dev --dotenv .env.local --host 127.0.0.1 --port 31900
scripts.prod: npm run convex:deploy && npm run prod:app
scripts.prod:app: nuxt build --dotenv .env.local && NITRO_HOST=127.0.0.1 NITRO_PORT=31899 PORT=31899 node .output/server/index.mjs
